name: Lentivirus Production & Transduction

components.name: 1. Day -1: 接种 4×10⁶ HEK293T 至 10 cm 皿
2. Day 0: 三质粒共转染
components.note: Transfer vector : psPAX2 : pMD2.G = 4:3:1 (如 10:7.5:2.5 µg/10cm 皿); PEI 或 Lipo2000 转染

components.name: 4. Day 3: 收集上清，0.45 µm 过滤
5. 转导: 病毒上清 + Polybrene 感染靶细胞
components.note: Polybrene 8 µg/mL; MOI 0.3–1 (稳转); 可 Day 2+3 收集两批上清合并

notes.en: 2nd-gen packaging: transfer + psPAX2 (Addgene #12260) + pMD2.G (#12259). BSL-2 required. Concentrate by ultracentrifugation (25,000×g 2h) or PEG-8000 for higher titer. Typical: 10⁶–10⁷ TU/mL unconcentrated, 10⁸–10⁹ after concentration. Kill curve for puromycin on parental cells first.
notes.zh: 二代包装体系：转移载体 + psPAX2 (Addgene #12260) + pMD2.G (#12259)。需 BSL-2。浓缩病毒：超速离心 (25,000×g 2h) 或 PEG-8000。未浓缩滴度 10⁶–10⁷ TU/mL，浓缩后 10⁸–10⁹。先做嘌呤霉素杀伤曲线确定筛选浓度。

ref: protocols.io doi:10.17504/protocols.io.yxmvm132ov3p; Dull et al. (1998) J Virol 72:8463–8471
